momentum.notes: Momentum usually improves when volatility compresses and breadth expands; currently not the dominant backdrop.

mean_reversion.notes: In strong uptrends, fade setups are lower quality and should stay tactical.

trend.notes: Trend participation rises when macro shocks fade and rates stabilize.

volume_breakout.notes: Breakouts work better when market internals confirm risk appetite.

support_resistance.notes: Still useful, but less edge than continuation setups in risk-on phases.

vwap.notes: VWAP setups remain usable intraday but not the primary alpha source.

relative_strength.notes: Sector and factor leadership tends to persist in healthier tapes.

news_catalyst.notes: Catalyst follow-through improves when macro stress is low and liquidity is steady.

momentum.notes: Long momentum often whipsaws in high-volatility, headline-driven conditions.

mean_reversion.notes: High VIX and stretched intraday moves can create repeatable snapback opportunities when risk is tightly controlled.

trend.notes: Downside or defensive trend trades can work while macro pressure persists.

volume_breakout.notes: Breakout failure risk is elevated when volatility and macro headlines dominate tape action.

support_resistance.notes: Levels tend to matter more as participants anchor around prior highs/lows and event pricing points.

vwap.notes: VWAP reversion can work intraday as liquidity providers mean-revert extreme prints.

relative_strength.notes: Long leaders versus weak beta is one of the cleaner ways to trade risk-off rotation.

news_catalyst.notes: Headline trades can pay, but reversal risk is high and requires fast execution.

momentum.notes: Momentum can work selectively but lacks consistent follow-through in mixed regimes.

mean_reversion.notes: Range behavior supports selective fade setups with tight invalidation.

trend.notes: Trend signals are less reliable when macro and sector rotation keep changing.

volume_breakout.notes: Breakouts need stronger volume and breadth filters to avoid false moves.

support_resistance.notes: Range edges and prior pivots often provide the best risk-adjusted entries.

vwap.notes: VWAP is often the highest-quality intraday anchor in neutral tape.

relative_strength.notes: Relative-strength rotation still offers edge, but leadership duration is shorter.

news_catalyst.notes: Catalyst outcomes are mixed when macro narrative is unresolved.
